descs.desc:
At 7+ Speed, Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Gain 1 [Agility] next turn

At 7+ Speed, Coin Power +2
[WinDuel] Gain 1 [Agility] next turn

[WhenUse] Gain 2 [Agility] next turn
[WinDuel] Deal more damage based on Clash count (+5% per Clash count, Max 50%)

At 10+ Speed, Coin Power +2
[WinDuel] Deal more damage based on Clash count (+5% per Clash count, Max 50%)

At 10+ Speed, Coin Power +3
[WinDuel] Deal more damage based on Clash count (+10% per Clash count, Max 100%)

1030501.name: A Noble Duel
1030501.desc: If Speed of all allies is higher than Speed of all enemies, this unit deals more damage based on the Speed difference between it and the slowest enemy. (+6% per 1 point of difference, Max 30%)

1030521.name: Dueling Request
1030521.desc: If Speed of all allies is higher than Speed of all enemies, the fastest ally deals more damage based on the Speed difference between it and the slowest enemy. (+3% per 1 point of difference, Max 15%)
